properties.Test Case: With a Device16x9 in Edit, scroll bars should not appear in Publish:BloomPUB Preview in speech bubbles, cf. BL-7911. (JT 6.3: I find this confusing. We DO want scroll bars, not overflow indications, for all text in ebooks. I think what it's getting at, based on BL-7911, is that there shouldn't be scroll bars in BloomPub preview when, in Edit mode, the bubble was manually or automatically adjusted not to need them.)
properties.Steps: With a Device16x9 in Edit, scroll bars should not appear in Publish:BloomPUB Preview in speech bubbles, cf. BL-7911. (JT 6.3: I find this confusing. We DO want scroll bars, not overflow indications, for all text in ebooks. I think what it's getting at, based on BL-7911, is that there shouldn't be scroll bars in BloomPub preview when, in Edit mode, the bubble was manually or automatically adjusted not to need them.)

properties.Test Case: Once a child bubble is occluded and you release it, the handle should be visible and functional.
properties.Steps: Once a child bubble is occluded and you release it, the handle should be visible and functional.

properties.Test Case: Attempt to publish a comic book to ePUB: OK as of 5.4, but will only allow Fixed mode
properties.Steps: Attempt to publish a comic book to ePUB: OK as of 5.4, but will only allow Fixed mode

properties.Test Case: Add multiple comic bubbles and record these. 'Next' and 'Back' should work according to your assigned ordering, likewise playback
properties.Steps: Add multiple comic bubbles and record these. 'Next' and 'Back' should work according to your assigned ordering, likewise playback

properties.Test Case: Record comic audio and publish to Bloom Reader. Ensure all audio is played.
properties.Steps: Record comic audio and publish to Bloom Reader. Ensure all audio is played.
